default.title: Obtain the Sinner
default.text: You're hiring? M-me! Pick me! I'm great at chores! Huh? You've got cleaning bots now...? Well... I can do other stuff too! Like... I've got super hearing! Lightning reflexes! And—hey, wait! Don't walk away!

default.title: Raise to Phase 1
default.text: Huh? The Aurum Secretum's side effects are barely there now! Yaaay!

default.title: Raise to Phase 3
default.text: Getting stronger is great and all... but maybe being too strong isn't so great? Like, I can already smell weird stuff in the air... What if it gets worse? Wait... you're not seriously telling me to wear a gas mask, are you?! You monster!

default.title: Level Start
default.text: We're heading out now? I... I'll go get ready real quick!

default.title: Victory
default.text: Yaaay, we did it! I knew we'd win! We have to celebrate after this. I'll get ALL the snacks!!

default.title: Lose Battles
default.text: Don't just stand there—run! Slowpoke's gonna get hurt!

default.title: Ultimate Skill
default.text: Take this! Ha!

default.title: Die in Battles
default.text: I guess I... just wasn't strong enough...

default.title: Greeting
default.text: Ohhh, Chief, you're in such a good mood today! I can even hear your steps are lighter than usual. Is it because you wanted to see me?

default.title: Conversation 1
default.text: Well... hehe... okay, so I might've sorta... heard the password sounds? And maybe tried them a few times? And then the vault door just popped open! I swear I just wanted to see if it'd work, but then all the alarms were screaming...

default.title: Conversation 2
default.text: Chief, I've got good news and bad news! The good news is... the windows are sparkling like diamonds now! The bad news is... um, that cleaning solution I used? The really expensive-looking one? I don't think it was meant for windows after all...

default.title: Conversation 3
default.text: Wait... so because of the shackles, we're like mind-reading each other now? It's just bits and pieces now, but... that's so weird! What if I wanna sneak snacks later? You're totally gonna know!

default.title: Special Conversation 1
default.text: Ugh, you have no idea how awful the labs in Fraser are! Once they drag you in, they won't let you leave. And next thing you know, they're sneaking you into some creepy experiment! But here? It's way better! No weird rules, and I actually get to visit everyone back home!

default.title: Special Conversation 2
default.text: Hmm... I never thought your shackles could do something like this... After all that time suffering from the side effects, you fixed it so easily? It's almost... weird not hurting anymore. Anyway, thank you... Wait, cut it out! You're peeking into my thoughts again!

default.title: Special Conversation 3
default.text: W-well, it's not all bad, I guess? Sometimes it's kinda handy, like mental texting, but—hey! Quit replaying me faceplanting yesterday in your head!! ...Are you laughing?! Okay, that's it. Prepare for a flying flask to the face!!

default.title: Full Compliance
default.text: You know... sometimes I think being able to peek into your thoughts is actually kinda nice. Not just because I understand you better now, but because I get to see the real you—when you struggle, hesitate, or feel lost. I know I'm not the strongest, but if you ever feel weighed down, let me help carry some of that burden, okay? After all, people who really get each other... that's what family's all about, right?

default.title: Idle
default.text: Mmm... the office fans' hum is so nice... just listening to it makes me... Zzz...

default.title: Annoyed
default.text: Waaah! Stop poking! I mean, sure, the side effects are gone now, but... that still tickles, you know...

default.title: Special Attention
default.text: Chief...? I kinda feel like... there are way more eyes watching me than just yours... A-are you sure it's only you? Really, really sure?

default.title: Dispatch
default.text: Aww, c'mon, we're family! Who cares about "missions" or "tasks"? If you need help, I'm already on it!

default.title: Dispatch Complete
default.text: Done, done! Pretty good, right?

default.title: Upgrade
default.text: Hehe! Did I just get a little quicker again?
